name: US.CurrAccBalance
Title: Balance of payments, Current account balance, annual
Keywords: Balance of payments, current account balance
Author: UNCTAD
Notes:
Description: 
This table shows the current account balance, expressed in millions of United States dollars and as percentage of GDP. 
 
Sources:
UNCTAD secretariat calculations, based on:
- IMF, Balance of Payments Statistics
- OECD, OECD.Stat
- IMF, World Economic Outlook
- National sources
 
Notes:
The current account forms part of the balance of payments and displays the flows of goods, services, primary income, and secondary income between residents and nonresidents of an economy. The current account balance measures, in general, the difference between current receipts and expenditures for internationally traded goods, services and income payments. At the same time, from a national perspective, the current account balance represents the gap between domestic saving and investment.
